epics.title: Validate and publish the Goodbye draft from the provided MP3

tasks.title: Run the repository-local audio analysis against the MP3 and capture explicit uncertainty
acceptance_criteria: The run records meter, tempo, bar count, and chord-span evidence from the provided MP3.
Any moderate-or-higher confidence gaps remain explicit in the run artifacts.
done_definition: A reusable audio-analysis summary is written into the run directory.

tasks.title: Update the Goodbye songs entry and publish a draft lead-sheet markdown file with a 7th-aware comparison
acceptance_criteria: The existing songs entry reflects the MP3-backed source and uncertainty notes.
The lead-sheets directory contains a Goodbye draft consistent with the practical chart.
The lead-sheet draft includes a musically cleaned 7th-aware comparison without overstating audio certainty.
No UI structure changes are introduced.
done_definition: The songs workspace data remains backward-compatible.

assumptions: The existing Goodbye chart is the preferred practical representation and should be validated, not replaced wholesale, by the audio draft.
A draft lead sheet in lead-sheets is an acceptable first publish state before full human approval.
risks: Raw MIR bars can suggest suspended or altered harmonies that are musically plausible but not publication-safe.
Without Node tooling in PATH, repo-standard lint/typecheck cannot be executed in this shell.
